CustomField.description: MIS-3139 Contact Status: not equal to “unqualified” AND Not at Company Flag not equal to Not at company AND created date: last 18 months
CustomField.formula: TEXT(Status__c) <> 'Unqualified' && TEXT(LID__No_longer_at_Company__c) <> 'Not at Company' && DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) >= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) -1, MONTH(TODAY()) - 6, DAY(TODAY()))
CustomField.label: Contact High Confidence
